name: Settings.Global Class (Android.Provider) | Microsoft Learn
snippet: Global system settings, containing preferences that always apply identically to all defined users.

name: android.provider.Settings.Global - HCL Software Open Source
snippet: Global system settings, containing preferences that always apply identically to all defined users. Applications can read these but are not allowed to write.

name: Restore preferred network option in Settings menu - Google Help
snippet: Open the Phone app and dial *#*#4636#*#*. Tap Phone information. Note the line under Set Preferred Network Type, 5G is enabled if it starts with NR.
